name: Wilson 2pk Acacia Dining Chair - Dark Brown - Christopher Knight Home: Water-Resistant, Traditional Style, Fixed Arms
description: Eating outside should feel like a special event no matter what the occasion. These stately Christopher Knight Home Wilson 2pk Acacia Dining Chairs in acacia wood accomplish just that - opulent and rich in texture, their simplicity does away with the tackiness of modern design normally associated with outdoor furniture. Versatile in design, these selections will easily complement any dining table you wish to pair them with and they will be the source of years of enjoyment.
